violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Food employee was observed putting on gloves without washing her hands. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Cover for portable fan on the counter was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Food employee observed putting on gloves without washing his hands. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
